case_title: HATAM,MANSOUR " MAX" VS. COMPTON CRAIG et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF HATAM,MANSOUR " MAX" SERVED MAR-23-2005, MAIL AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE
